name: standup
description: Local-first daily stand-up generator. Watches your git, IDE activity & GitHub, drafts your stand-up with a local LLM, posts to Discord/Slack.

standup.lookbackHours.description: How many hours back to gather activity when generating a stand-up.

standup.ollama.url.description: Base URL of your local Ollama server.

standup.ollama.model.description: Ollama model to use for summarizing your activity.

standup.github.token.markdownDescription: Optional GitHub personal access token (fine-grained or classic with `repo` read). Used to fetch closed issues and merged PRs. Leave empty to skip GitHub.

standup.github.repos.markdownDescription: Repos to check, as `owner/name`. If empty, Standup auto-detects from the current workspace's git `origin` remote.

standup.webhook.type.description: Where the Send button posts your stand-up.

standup.webhook.url.markdownDescription: Incoming webhook URL for Discord or Slack. No bot or OAuth needed — create an incoming webhook in your channel settings.

standup.track.enabled.description: Track IDE activity (which files you edit and save). Stored locally only.
